verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
በሎሙ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወንሥኡ ፡ ሊተ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ጥሪትክሙ ፡ መባአ ፡ ዘሐለይክሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ልብክሙ ፡
                  ንሣእ ፡ መባአ ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, and take first-fruits of all, who may be disposed in their heart to give; and ye shall take my first-fruits.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, that they bring me an offering: of every man that giveth it willingly with his heart ye shall take my offering.

verses.geez: ወዛቲ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ መባእ ፡ ዘትነሥኡ ፡ እምላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ወብሩረ ፤

translations.lxx: And this is the offering which ye shall take of them; gold and silver and brass,
translations.kjv: And this is the offering which ye shall take of them; gold, and silver, and brass,

verses.geez: ብርተ ፡ ወያክንተ ፤ ሜላተ ፡ ወነተ ፡ ክዑበ ፡ ወቡሶሰ ፡ ክዑበ ፡ ወጸጕረ ፡ ጠሊ ፤

translations.lxx: and blue, and purple, and double scarlet, and fine spun linen, and goats' hair,
translations.kjv: And blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats’ hair,

verses.geez: ወማእሰ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ሕሡየ ፡ ወአምእስተ ፡ ዘሥርየቱ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ያክንት ፡ ወዕፀ ፡ ዘኢይነቅዝ ፤

translations.lxx: and oil for the light, incense for anointing oil, and for the composition of incense,
translations.kjv: And rams’ skins dyed red, and badgers’ skins, and shittim wood,

verses.geez: ወእብነ ፡ ስርድዮን ፡ ወእብነ ፡ ዘይትኀረው ፡ ኤጶሚዳ ፡ ጶዴሬ ።

translations.lxx: and sardius stones, and stones for the carved work of the breast-plate, and the full-length robe.
translations.kjv: Onyx stones, and stones to be set in the ephod, and in the breastplate.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ሌተ ፡ ምቅዳሰ ፡ ወእትረአይ ፡ በላዕሌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make me a sanctuary, and I will appear among you.
translations.kjv: And let them make me a sanctuary; that I may dwell among them.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ሊተ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ አርእየክሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደብር ፡ አርአያ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ወአርአያ ፡ ንዋያ ፡
                  ለትዕይንት ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ትገብሩ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make for me according to all things which I shew thee in the mountain; even the pattern of the tabernacle, and the pattern of all its furniture: so shalt thou make it.
translations.kjv: According to all that I shew thee, after the pattern of the tabernacle, and the pattern of all the instruments thereof, even so shall ye make it.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ሊተ ፡ ታቦተ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ዘዕ[ፅ ፡ ዘ]ኢይነቅዝ ፡ ዘካዕበ ፡ እመት ፡ ወመንፈቀ ፡ እመት ፡ ኑኁ ፡
                  ወእመት ፡ ወመንፈቀ ፡ እመት ፡ ፅፍሑ ፡ ወእመት ፡ ወመንፈቀ ፡ እመት ፡ ቆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the ark of testimony of incorruptible wood; the length of two cubits and a half, and the breadth of a cubit and a half, and the height of a cubit and a half.
translations.kjv: And they shall make an ark of shittim wood: two cubits and a half shall be the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.

verses.geez:
ወትቀፍልዎ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ እምውሳጤሁ ፡ ወእምአፍአሁ ፡ ወትቀፍልዋ ፡ ወትገብር ፡ በውስቴታ ፡ ማዕበለ ፡ ዘወርቀ ፡
                  ዘኍጻዳት ፡ እምዐውዳ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt gild it with pure gold, thou shalt gild it within and without; and thou shalt make for it golden wreaths twisted round about.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, within and without shalt thou overlay it, and shalt make upon it a crown of gold round about.

verses.geez:
ወትዘብጥዋ ፡ ፅብነ ፡ አርባዕ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ወታነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፬ምስ[ማካ]ቲሃ ፡ ፅብነ ፡ ፪ውስተ ፡ መስመክ ፡ አሐዱ
                  ፡ ወፅብነ ፡ ፪ውስተ ፡ ዳግም ፡ ምስማክ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt cast for it four golden rings, and shalt put them on the four sides; two rings on the one side, and two rings on the other side.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt cast four rings of gold for it, and put them in the four corners thereof; and two rings shall be in the one side of it, and two rings in the other side of it.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ መጻውሪሃ ፡ እምዕፀ[ው ፡ ዘ]ኢይነቅዝ ፡ ወትቀፍሎ ፡ [በ]ወርቅ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make staves of incorruptible wood, and shalt gild them with gold.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make staves of shittim wood, and overlay them with gold.

verses.geez:
ወታብእ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ድንባዛቲሃ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዝኩ ፡ ፅብነ ፡ አርባዕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እለ ፡ መሰመክ ፡ ዘታቦት ፡ መስከሚሃ ፡
                  ለታቦት ፡ በዘ ፡ ይሰክምዋ ፡ ቦቱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put the staves into the rings on the sides of the ark, to bear the ark with them.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put the staves into the rings by the sides of the ark, that the ark may be borne with them.

verses.geez: [በአፅባን ፡] በዘ ፡ አዘዝኩክሙ ፡ ለይኩን ፡ ድንባዛት ፡ ይትወደድ ፡ ዘኢያንቀለቀል ።

translations.lxx: The staves shall remain fixed in the rings of the ark.
translations.kjv: The staves shall be in the rings of the ark: they shall not be taken from it.

verses.geez: ወትደዩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ታቦት ፡ ትእዛዘ ፡ ዘአሀብከ ፡ ሀሎ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put into the ark the testimonies which I shall give thee.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put into the ark the testimony which I shall give thee.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ መልዕልቴሃ ፡ ተድባበ ፡ ተውሳኮ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ዘንጹሕ ፡ ዘካዕበ ፡ እመት ፡ ወመንፈቀ ፡ እመት ፡
                  [ኑኁ ፡] ወፅፍኁ ፡ እመት ፡ ወንፍቃ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make a propitiatory, a lid of pure gold; the length of two cubits and a half, and the breadth of a cubit and a half.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make a mercy seat of pure gold: two cubits and a half shall be the length thereof, and a cubit and a half the breadth thereof.

verses.geez:
ወትገብሩ ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ ኬሩቤን ፡ ቅፍሎ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ፍሕቆ ፡ ወታነብሮን ፡ ኵለሄ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምስማካቲ[ሁ] ፡ ለተድ[ባብ]
                  ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make two cherubs graven in gold, and thou shalt put them on both sides of the propitiatory.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make two cherubims of gold, of beaten work shalt thou make them, in the two ends of the mercy seat.

verses.geez:
ይትገበር ፡ ኬሩብ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምዝ ፡ መስመክ ፡ ወኬሩብ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምዝ ፡ መስመክ ፡ ዘዳግም ፡ ዘተድባብ ፡ ወትገብሩ
                  ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ ኬሩብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክልኤሆን ፡ መስመክት ።

translations.lxx: They shall be made, one cherub on this side, and another cherub on the other side of the propitiatory; and thou shalt make the two cherubs on the two sides.
translations.kjv: And make one cherub on the one end, and the other cherub on the other end: even of the mercy seat shall ye make the cherubims on the two ends thereof.

verses.geez:
ይኩና ፡ ኬሩቤ[ን] ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይረብባ ፡ ክነፊሆን ፡ እመልዕልት ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይጼልላ ፡ በክነፊሆን ፡ መልዕልተ ፡ ተድባብ
                  ፡ ወገጾን ፡ ይትናጸሩ ፡ በበይኖን ፡ በዲበ ፡ ተድባብ ፡ ግበር ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ገጾን ፡ ይትናጸሩ ፡ ለኬሩቤን ።

translations.lxx: The cherubs shall stretch forth their wings above, overshadowing the propitiatory with their wings; and their faces shall be toward each other, the faces of the cherubs shall be toward the propitiatory.
translations.kjv: And the cherubims shall stretch forth their wings on high, covering the mercy seat with their wings, and their faces shall look one to another; toward the mercy seat shall the faces of the cherubims be.

verses.geez: ወትዌጥሕ ፡ ተድባበ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ታቦት ፡ መልዕልቴሃ ፡ [ወውስተ ፡] ታቦት ፡ ትደይ ፡ ትእዛዘ ፡ ዘአነ ፡ እሁበከ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt set the propitiatory on the ark above, and thou shalt put into the ark the testimonies which I shall give thee.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put the mercy seat above upon the ark; and in the ark thou shalt put the testimony that I shall give thee.

verses.geez:
ወእትአመር ፡ ለከ ፡ በህየ ፡ ወእትናገረከ ፡ እምላዕሉ ፡ እምዲበ ፡ ተድባብ ፡ እማእከለ ፡ ክልኤቲ ፡ ኪሩቤን ፡ እምእለ
                  ፡ ሀለዋ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ታቦት ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ትእዛዘ ፡ [ዘ]አዘዝኩ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And I will make myself known to thee from thence, and I will speak to thee above the propitiatory between the two cherubs, which are upon the ark of testimony, even in all things which I shall charge thee concerning the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And there I will meet with thee, and I will commune with thee from above the mercy seat, from between the two cherubims which are upon the ark of the testimony, of all things which I will give thee in commandment unto the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ሊተ ፡ ማእደ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ኑኁ ፡ ካዕበ ፡ እመት ፡ ወፅፍሑ ፡ እመት ፡ ወቆሙ ፡ እመት ፡
                  [ወመንፈቀ ፡ እመት ።]

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make a golden table of pure gold, in length two cubits, and in breadth a cubit, and in height a cubit and a half.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt also make a table of shittim wood: two cubits shall be the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof.

verses.geez: ወግብራ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማዕበል ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ዐውዳ ፡ ወትገብር ፡ ቀጸላሃ ፡ ፅብነ ፡ አርባዕ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make for it golden wreaths twisted round about, and thou shalt make for it a crown of an hand-breadth round about.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, and make thereto a crown of gold round about.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ኍጻዳተ ፡ ዘማዕበል ፡ ለቀጸላሃ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make a twisted wreath for the crown round about.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make unto it a border of an hand breadth round about, and thou shalt make a golden crown to the border thereof round about.

verses.geez: ወግበር ፡ አርባዕተ ፡ ሕለቃተ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ወአንብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ አርባዕቱ ፡ ፍና ፡ ዘእገሪሃ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ቀጸላሃ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make four golden rings; and thou shalt put the four rings upon the four parts of its feet under the crown.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make for it four rings of gold, and put the rings in the four corners that are on the four feet thereof.

verses.geez: ወይኩን ፡ አ[ፅባኒ]ሃ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ለምጽዋሪሃ ፡ ዘያነሥእ ፡ ማእደ ።

translations.lxx: And the rings shall be for bearings for the staves, that they may bear the table with them.
translations.kjv: Over against the border shall the rings be for places of the staves to bear the table.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ መጻውሪሃ ፡ እምዕ[ፅ ፡ ዘ]ኢይነቅዝ ፡ ወትቀፍሎ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ወቦቱ ፡ ይትገሐሥ ፡ ማእድ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the staves of incorruptible wood, and thou shalt gild them with pure gold; and the table shall be borne with them.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make the staves of shittim wood, and overlay them with gold, that the table may be borne with them.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ መዓንፍቲሃ ፡ ወአጽሕልቲሃ ፡ ወቤተ ፡ መዋጽሕታ ፡ ወመስፈርታ ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ታወጽሕ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ እምንጹሕ ፡
                  ወርቅ ፡ ግበሮ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make its dishes and its censers, and its bowls, and its cups, with which thou shalt offer drink-offerings: of pure gold shalt thou make them.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make the dishes thereof, and spoons thereof, and covers thereof, and bowls thereof, to cover withal: of pure gold shalt thou make them.

verses.geez: ወአንብር ፡ [ኅብስተ ፡] ዲበ ፡ ማእዱ ፡ በቅድሜየ ፡ ዘልፈ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt set upon the table shewbread before me continually.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt set upon the table shewbread before me alway.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ተቅዋመ ፡ ማኅቶታ ፡ እምወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ፍሕቆ ፡ ግበራ ፡ ተቅዋመ ፡ ማኅቶታ ፡ ዐምደ ፡ ወአብራዒሃ ፤
                  መኣኅዚሃ ፡ ወከባበ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ወጽጌያቲሃ ፡ እምውስቴታ ፡ ይትገበር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make a candlestick of pure gold; thou shalt make the candlestick of graven work: its stem and its branches, and its bowls and its knops and its lilies shall be of one piece.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make a candlestick of pure gold: of beaten work shall the candlestick be made: his shaft, and his branches, his bowls, his knops, and his flowers, shall be of the same.

verses.geez:
ስድስቱ ፡ አብራዕ ፡ እለ ፡ ይትገበራ ፡ በገቦሃ ፤ ሠለስቱ ፡ አብራዕ ፡ ለተቅዋመ ፡ ማኅቶታ ፡ እምአሐዱ ፡ ፍናሃ ፡
                  ወሠለስቱ ፡ አብራዕ ፡ እምፍናሃ ፡ እምካልእ ።

translations.lxx: And six branches proceeding sideways, three branches of the candlestick from one side of it, and three branches of the candlestick from the other side.
translations.kjv: And six branches shall come out of the sides of it; three branches of the candlestick out of the one side, and three branches of the candlestick out of the other side:

verses.geez:
ወሠለስቱ ፡ መኣኅዚሃ ፡ እለ ፡ ዮኀብራ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ፩ከባበ ፡ ርእሳ ፡ ጽጉይ ፤ ከማሁ ፡ ለስድስቲሆሙ ፡ አብራዕ ፡ ለእለ
                  ፡ ይወጽኡ ፡ እምተቅዋመ ፡ ማኅቶት ።

translations.lxx: And three bowls fashioned like almonds, on each branch a knop and a lily; so to the six branches proceeding from the candlestick,
translations.kjv: Three bowls made like unto almonds, with a knop and a flower in one branch; and three bowls made like almonds in the other branch, with a knop and a flower: so in the six branches that come out of the candlestick.

verses.geez: ወለተቅዋመ ፡ ማኅቶታ ፡ መኣኅዚሃ ፡ አርባዕቱ ፡ [ወ]ጽጌያታ ፡ [ወከባበ ፡ ርእሳ] ።

translations.lxx: and in the candlestick four bowls fashioned like almonds, in each branch knops and the flowers of the same.
translations.kjv: And in the candlestick shall be four bowls made like unto almonds, with their knops and their flowers.

verses.geez:
ከባበ ፡ ርእሳ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ አብራዕ ፤ ከማሁ ፡ ለስድስቱሂ ፡ አብራዑ ፡ እለ ፡ ይወፅኡ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ተቅዋመ
                  ፡ ማኅቶት ።

translations.lxx: A knop under two branches out of it, and a knop under four branches out of it; so to the six branches proceeding from the candlestick; and in the candlestick four bowls fashioned like almonds.
translations.kjv: And there shall be a knop under two branches of the same, and a knop under two branches of the same, and a knop under two branches of the same, according to the six branches that proceed out of the candlestick.

verses.geez: ከባበ ፡ ርእሳ ፡ ወአብራዒሃ ፡ እምውስቴታ ፡ ይኩና ፤ ኵሎን ፡ ፍሕቆ ፡ እምአሐዱ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ።

translations.lxx: Let the knops and the branches be of one piece, altogether graven of one piece of pure gold.
translations.kjv: Their knops and their branches shall be of the same: all it shall be one beaten work of pure gold.

verses.geez: ትገብር ፡ መኃትዊሃ ፡ ፯ወትሥራዕ ፡ መኃትወ ፡ ወያርእዩ ፡ እምአሐዱ ፡ ገጽ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make its seven lamps: and thou shalt set on it the lamps, and they shall shine from one front.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make the seven lamps thereof: and they shall light the lamps thereof, that they may give light over against it.

verses.geez: ዘእምድኅሬሃ ፡ ወሥርዐታ ፡ እምወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ፍሕቆ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make its funnel and its snuff-dishes of pure gold.
translations.kjv: And the tongs thereof, and the snuffdishes thereof, shall be of pure gold.

verses.geez: ዘትገብር ፡ ዘኵሎ ፡ ንቁያ ፡ አርአያ ፡ አርአይኩከ ፡ በደብር ።

translations.lxx: See, thou shalt make them according to the pattern shewed thee in the mount.
translations.kjv: And look that thou make them after their pattern, which was shewed thee in the mount.
